<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="es">

<head>

<meta charset="UTF-8">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<meta name="description" content="Otniel Altamirano — Design · Transmedia · Cultural Ecosystems · Level I National Researcher SNI-CONAHCYT">

<title>Otniel Altamirano</title>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>

:root{

  --ink:#0C0C0C;--paper:#F7F5F0;--warm:#EDE9E1;--mid:#6B6660;--rule:#D5D0C8;

  --terracotta:#C4614A;--terracotta2:#D97558;--sage:#4A6741;--navy:#1D3557;--white:#FFFFFF;--r:6px;

}

*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}

html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}

body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}


.lang-toggle{position:fixed;top:18px;right:18px;z-index:999;display:flex;gap:4px}

.lang-toggle button{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1.5px solid var(--rule);background:rgba(247,245,240,0.9);color:var(--mid);cursor:pointer;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);transition:all .2s}

.lang-toggle button.on{background:var(--ink);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--ink)}

[data-lang="en"] .es{display:none}

[data-lang="es"] .en{display:none}


nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:500;background:rgba(247,245,240,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule);padding:0 40px;height:54px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}

.nav-name{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.04em;color:var(--ink)}

.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2px;list-style:none}

.nav-links a{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:4px;text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s,background .2s}

.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--ink);background:var(--warm)}


.hero{min-height:100svh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;position:relative;overflow:hidden}

.hero-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:80px 56px;position:relative;z-index:1;background:var(--ink)}

.hero-right{position:relative;overflow:hidden}

.hero-right img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;filter:grayscale(15%) contrast(1.05)}

.hero-right::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(12,12,12,0.25) 0%,transparent 40%)}

.hero-tag{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta2);margin-bottom:24px}

.hero-name{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,5.5vw,5rem);line-height:1.0;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:20px}

.hero-name em{font-style:italic;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)}

.hero-desc{font-size:1rem;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);max-width:400px;margin-bottom:40px;font-weight:300}

.hero-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden}

.kpi{padding:18px 16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04)}

.kpi-n{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.2rem;color:var(--white);line-height:1}

.kpi-l{font-size:0.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.3}

.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:32px;left:56px;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}

.hero-scroll::before{content:'';width:40px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2)}


.section{padding:100px 40px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}

.section-full{padding:100px 0}

.section-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 40px}


.eyebrow{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:40px}

.eyebrow::before{content:'';width:28px;height:1.5px;background:var(--terracotta)}

h2.serif{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:20px}

h2.serif em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mid)}


.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:380px 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start}

.about-photo{position:relative}

.about-photo img{width:100%;display:block;border-radius:2px;filter:grayscale(8%)}

.about-photo::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-12px;left:-12px;right:12px;bottom:12px;border:1.5px solid var(--terracotta);border-radius:2px;z-index:-1}

.about-text p{font-size:1rem;line-height:1.8;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:20px}

.about-text strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600}

.tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:28px}

.tag{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.04em;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--warm);color:var(--ink);border:1px solid var(--rule)}


.conf-feature{margin-top:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:var(--r);max-height:520px}

.conf-feature img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 20%;display:block;filter:brightness(0.88);transition:filter .4s}

.conf-feature:hover img{filter:brightness(1)}

.conf-feature-caption{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:32px 28px 24px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.7));font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85)}


.dist-section{background:var(--ink);color:var(--white)}

.dist-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);margin-top:52px}

.dist-card{background:var(--ink);padding:48px 36px;position:relative;transition:background .3s}

.dist-card:hover{background:#141414}

.dist-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:2px;height:0;background:var(--terracotta);transition:height .4s}

.dist-card:hover::before{height:100%}

.dist-yr{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta2);margin-bottom:16px}

.dist-t{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;line-height:1.3;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:14px}

.dist-d{font-size:0.82rem;line-height:1.65;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45)}


.pub-section{background:var(--warm)}

.pub-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin-top:52px}

.pub-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:72px 1fr 80px;gap:20px;align-items:center;padding:22px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--rule)}

.pub-item:last-child{border-bottom:none}

.pub-yr{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--terracotta)}

.pub-title{font-size:0.92rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.45;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:5px}

.pub-meta{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--mid)}

.pub-btn{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink);text-decoration:none;padding:7px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--ink);border-radius:20px;white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;transition:all .2s}

.pub-btn:hover{background:var(--ink);color:var(--white)}


.eva{background:var(--navy);border-radius:var(--r);padding:48px;margin-top:24px}

.eva-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px}

.eva-sub{font-size:0.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-bottom:28px}

.eva-pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}

.epill{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.06em;color:var(--white);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);padding:8px 18px;border-radius:20px;text-decoration:none;transition:all .2s;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05)}

.epill:hover{background:var(--white);color:var(--navy)}


.mgmt-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-top:24px}

.mgmt-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-left:3px solid var(--terracotta)}

.mgmt-label{font-size:0.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--terracotta);margin-bottom:10px}

.mgmt-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:6px}

.mgmt-detail{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.5}


.conf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-top:52px}

.conf-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px;border:1px solid var(--rule);position:relative;transition:transform .25s,box-shadow .25s}

.conf-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)}

.conf-flag{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:14px}

.conf-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:10px}

.conf-venue{font-size:0.76rem;color:var(--mid)}

.conf-domain{display:inline-block;margin-top:8px;font-size:0.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(74,103,65,0.1);color:var(--sage);border:1px solid rgba(74,103,65,0.25)}

.conf-chip{display:inline-block;margin-top:6px;margin-left:4px;font-size:0.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:3px;background:rgba(29,53,87,0.08);color:var(--navy);border:1px solid rgba(29,53,87,0.2)}

.conf-link{display:inline-block;margin-top:10px;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--terracotta);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,97,74,0.3);padding-bottom:1px}


.doc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-top:40px}

.doc-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:30px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--terracotta)}

.doc-flag{font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:10px}

.doc-title{font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:8px}

.doc-inst{font-size:0.76rem;color:var(--mid)}


.net-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:40px}

.net-card{background:var(--white);border-radius:var(--r);padding:26px;border:1px solid var(--rule);border-top:2px solid var(--navy);transition:border-top-color .3s}

.net-card:hover{border-top-color:var(--terracotta)}

.net-country{font-size:0.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:10px}

.net-name{font-size:0.88rem;font-weight:500;line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:8px}

.net-link{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--terracotta);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,97,74,0.3)}


footer{background:var(--ink);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);padding:72px 40px;text-align:center}

.footer-name{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:12px}

.footer-sub{font-size:0.82rem;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:28px}

.footer-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}

.footer-link{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;padding:8px 22px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:20px;transition:all .2s}

.footer-link:hover{background:var(--white);color:var(--ink)}


.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .75s,transform .75s}

.reveal.vis{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}


@media(max-width:768px){

  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;min-height:auto}

  .hero-left{padding:100px 24px 48px;order:2}

  .hero-right{height:55vw;order:1}

  .hero-kpis{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}

  nav{padding:0 16px}.nav-links{display:none}

  .section{padding:72px 20px}.section-inner{padding:0 20px}

  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px}

  .about-photo{max-width:320px}.about-photo::before{display:none}

  .dist-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}

  .pub-item{grid-template-columns:52px 1fr}.pub-btn{display:none}

  footer{padding:48px 20px}.section-full{padding:72px 0}

}

</style>

</head>

<body data-lang="es">


<div class="lang-toggle">

  <button class="on" id="bes" onclick="setLang('es')">ES</button>

  <button id="ben" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>

</div>


<nav>

  <span class="nav-name">Otniel Altamirano</span>

  <ul class="nav-links">

    <li><a href="#about"><span class="es">Perfil</span><span class="en">Profile</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#distinctions"><span class="es">Distinciones</span><span class="en">Distinctions</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#publications"><span class="es">Publicaciones</span><span class="en">Publications</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#conferences"><span class="es">Congresos</span><span class="en">Conferences</span></a></li>

    <li><a href="#doctoral"><span class="es">Formación</span><span class="en">Training</span></a></li>

  </ul>

</nav>


<!-- HERO -->

<div class="hero">

  <div class="hero-left">

    <p class="hero-tag es">Investigador Nacional Nivel I · SNI–CONAHCYT · México</p>

    <p class="hero-tag en">Level I National Researcher · SNI–CONAHCYT · México</p>

    <h1 class="hero-name">Otniel<br><em>Altamirano</em></h1>

    <p class="hero-desc es">Diseño · Transmedia · Ecología de los Medios<br>Doctor en Diseño, UNESP Brasil · México</p>

    <p class="hero-desc en">Design · Transmedia · Media Ecology<br>PhD in Design, UNESP Brazil · México</p>

    <div class="hero-kpis">

      <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">6</div><div class="kpi-l"><span class="es">Países</span><span class="en">Countries</span></div></div>

      <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">25+</div><div class="kpi-l"><span class="es">Publicaciones</span><span class="en">Publications</span></div></div>

      <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">7×</div><div class="kpi-l">EVA London</div></div>

      <div class="kpi"><div class="kpi-n">3</div><div class="kpi-l"><span class="es">Doctorados</span><span class="en">PhDs active</span></div></div>

    </div>

    <p class="hero-scroll">scroll</p>

  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">

alt="Otniel Altamirano">

    </div>

    <div class="about-text">

      <h2 class="serif reveal es">Investigador transdisciplinar: <em>diseño, transmedia, ecología de los medios</em></h2>

      <h2 class="serif reveal en">Transdisciplinary researcher: <em>design, transmedia, media ecology</em></h2>


      <p class="reveal es">Mexicano. <strong>Doctor en Diseño</strong> por la Universidade Estadual Paulista (UNESP/FAAC, Brasil). Profesor de Tiempo Completo en la UABJO (Universidad Autónoma "Benito Juárez" de Oaxaca) e <strong>Investigador Nacional Nivel I</strong> del SNI–CONAHCYT — el Sistema Nacional de Investigadoras e Investigadores del Consejo Nacional de Humanidades, Ciencias y Tecnologías del Estado mexicano.</p>

      <p class="reveal en">Mexican researcher. <strong>PhD in Design</strong> from Universidade Estadual Paulista (UNESP/FAAC, Brazil). Full-time Professor at UABJO (Autonomous University "Benito Juárez" of Oaxaca) and <strong>Level I National Researcher</strong> of the SNI–CONAHCYT — Mexico's National System of Researchers, awarded by the National Council for Humanities, Sciences and Technologies.</p>


      <p class="reveal es">Su trabajo articula diseño de producto, arquitectura, nuevos medios, transmedia y ecología de los medios — con aplicación en comunidades culturalmente vulnerables de México y proyección verificable en seis países. Su trayectoria trasciende las fronteras disciplinares del diseño: ha participado en congresos de arte y tecnologías digitales (EVA London, BCS), turismo y ciencia de datos (WIDE-HTR, Temple University), y comunicación e informática, lo que evidencia la dimensión transversal de su investigación.</p>

      <p class="reveal en">His work connects product design, architecture, new media, transmedia and media ecology — applied to culturally vulnerable communities in Mexico, with verifiable reach across six countries. His research trajectory crosses disciplinary boundaries: participation in conferences on art and digital technologies (EVA London, BCS), tourism and data science (WIDE-HTR, Temple University), and communications and informatics, reflecting the cross-cutting dimension of his research agenda.</p>

        <div class="dist-yr">2022 – 2027</div>

        <div class="dist-t es">Investigador Nacional Nivel I · SNI–CONAHCYT, México</div>

        <div class="dist-t en">Level I National Researcher · SNI–CONAHCYT, México</div>

        <div class="dist-d es">Distinción máxima del Estado mexicano para investigadores en activo. Otorgada por el Sistema Nacional de Investigadoras e Investigadores (SNI) del Consejo Nacional de Humanidades, Ciencias y Tecnologías (CONAHCYT).</div>

        <div class="dist-d en">Mexico's highest scientific distinction for active researchers. Awarded by the National System of Researchers (SNI) of the National Council for Humanities, Sciences and Technologies (CONAHCYT).</div>

      </div>

      <div class="dist-card reveal">

        <div class="dist-yr">2026</div>

        <div class="dist-t en">Research Trajectory Award · Universidad de Palermo, Argentina</div>

        <div class="dist-d es">Distinción honorífica del Instituto de Investigación en Diseño, Facultad de Diseño y Comunicación, UP — principal red de investigación en diseño de América Latina. Entregada presencialmente en 2026.</div>

        <div class="dist-d en">Honorary distinction from the Design Research Institute, Faculty of Design and Communication, UP — the leading design research network in Latin America. Presented in person in 2026.</div>

</footer>


<script>

function setLang(l){

  document.body.setAttribute('data-lang',l);

  document.getElementById('bes').classList.toggle('on',l==='es');

  document.getElementById('ben').classList.toggle('on',l==='en');

  localStorage.setItem('lang',l);

}

(function(){var s=localStorage.getItem('lang');if(s)setLang(s);})();

var ob=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){

  entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('vis');ob.unobserve(e.target)}});

},{threshold:0.08,rootMargin:'0px 0px -30px 0px'});

document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(function(el){ob.observe(el)});

var ly=0;

window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){

  var y=window.scrollY;

  document.querySelector('nav').style.transform=(y>ly&&y>100)?'translateY(-100%)':'translateY(0)';

  ly=y;

},{passive:true});

</script>

</body>

</html>
